title: Repair Plus
description: RepairPlus is a plugin that allows players to repair their held item or entire inventory using simple commands, featuring an admin GUI to configure cooldowns and toggle each repair command on or off.
body:
# 🔧 RepairPlus

**RepairPlus** is a plugin that lets players repair their items in-game through commands (/repair, /repairall) which is also configurable by admins through a clean in-game GUI.

## ✨ Features

### 🎯 How It Works
1. **Hold your item**: Equip the item you want to repair in your main hand
2. **Run /repair**: Your item is instantly restored to full durability
3. **Or run /repairall**: Every damageable item in your inventory and armor slots gets repaired at once
4. **Cooldowns**: Players must wait before using each command again

### ⚙️ Admin Settings GUI
- **Toggle /repair**: Enable or disable the /repair command
- **Toggle /repairall**: Enable or disable the /repairall command
- **Cooldown Control**: Left-click to increase, right-click to decrease cooldowns
- **Shift+Click**: Adjust cooldowns in increments of 10 seconds
- **Auto-Save**: All changes save instantly to config.yml

### 🔧 Additional Features
- **Config**: Settings survive server restarts
- **Permission Support**: Control who can use each command

## 🎮 Commands
- `/repair` - Repair the item in your main hand
- `/repairall` - Repair all items in your inventory and armor
- `/repairsettings` - Open the admin settings GUI

## 🔑 Permissions
- `repairplus.repair` - Access to /repair (default: true)
- `repairplus.repair.all` - Access to /repairall (default: true)
- `repairplus.admin` - Access to /repairsettings (default: op)
